title: Grid Squid
short_description: Gary the squid lost his 8 shoes across a coordinate grid — tap the right spot, or the tentacle slaps a tuna who slaps back.
description: Gary the Grid Squid has EIGHT shoes and has lost all of them across the coordinate grid. Read each location and tap the right spot to send a tentacle — miss and it slaps a passing tuna, and the tuna WILL slap back (and possibly press charges). Grade bands ramp from battleship-style grid squares like B3, to first-quadrant coordinate points like (4, 2), to translations ("move 3 right, then 2 up — where does Gary land?"). A free online coordinates and grid-reading game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the grid square or coordinate point named in the task.
